pose_notes: Beak peck motion reads with 2px vertical head movement.
Include a 3x3 seed near beak in frames 2-4 using #FFEC27.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 240x40px (6 frames × 40x40) with 0px spacing.
Animation plays at 4fps and respects loop/play_count settings in specs.animation.
Sprite remains readable at 1x scale on a 128x128 canvas; no anti-aliasing and only listed colors are used.
shared_properties: Echo keeps crest, cheek patch, beak, and tail readable in every occupied frame.
Body footprint stays inside 40x40px and remains centered near x44 y42.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
differences: State_eating uses 6 frames at 4fps with one care-response cycle.
Head pitch targets the bowl zone on the lower left quadrant.
Beak open-close beats stay visible in at least 4 occupied frames.
